reasoning: Zoomed inspection reveals multiple AI tells at 8x. Outline thickness varies between 1px and 2px inconsistently around shoulders, hips, and lower robe hem — clean pixel art maintains uniform outline weight. Left/right body symmetry breaks in the shoulder pad sizing and the chain mail checkerboard positioning is slightly off-axis. The brown/tan armor shoulder plates show subtle luminance gradation rather than strict 2-3 hard tones, a classic AI softness artifact. The chain mail body pattern (blue-white checker) has pixel-level irregularities: some cells are 1x1, others bleed into adjacent cells, indicating the generator lost track of the repeating tile. Slight color fringing where white hair meets the dark outline near the face. Face is minimal and semantically passable. Background is clean. The sprite reads as armor+chain at a glance (no semantic failure) but the accumulated micro-artifacts across outline weight, symmetry, and pattern regularity push this to marginal rather than pass.
